refnamediv.refpurpose: A composite type that consists of a sequence number and an edge number.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: A composite type that consists of a sequence number and an edge number. This is the return type for ST_GetFaceEdges and GetNodeEdges functions.

listitem.para: sequence is an integer: Refers to a topology defined in the topology.topology table which defines the topology schema and srid.
edge is an integer: The identifier of an edge.
